era_counterfactual.note: Removed entirely from R2; replaced by universe-wide persistence atlas.

mainstream_reference.source: ESPN MLB player batting stat leaders

murakami_reproducibility.note: data_pull.py now uses MLB Stats API people/search fallback and caches data/mlb_stats_api_player_cache.json.

shap_permutation_discipline.note: SHAP dropped from R2 after R1 rank-correlation failure; permutation importance only.

xwoba_gap_feature.note: Signed gap, absolute gap, and xwOBA-vs-prior residual are explicit model features; absolute gap is the top-tier gap feature if signed gap is diluted by collinearity.

xwoba_gap.sign_convention: gap = xwOBA - wOBA; positive means actual wOBA is below expected contact quality, negative means actual wOBA is above expected contact quality.
